_comment: Target list for the champagne outbound channel. Copy this to targets.json and replace with REAL prospects before you run for real. Every row is a company you believe is at a buying moment for what you sell, with the PUBLIC source that proves it. These example rows use fictional companies on purpose, so nothing false about a real business is ever staged. signalPlain is a plain-English one-liner that drops straight into the email. sourceLabel/sourceUrl are the receipt. firstName/title/email are the person you'd reach.

targets.title: VP of Operations
targets.signalPlain: Acme is sunsetting its TMS API at the end of March and you're already hiring two engineers for the migration
targets.sourceLabel: Acme end-of-life notice + 2 migration job posts

targets.title: Operations Director
targets.signalPlain: Sunbelt is opening a fourth location in June and posted six new front-desk and hygienist roles this month

targets.title: Head of Revenue Operations
targets.signalPlain: you just stepped into a brand-new RevOps role, and the first 90 days are when the tool stack gets decided

targets.title: VP of Sales
targets.signalPlain: you just took over sales at Aperture, and new sales leaders rebuild the outbound motion in month one

targets.title: Managing Partner
targets.signalPlain: Harbor posted five new roles this quarter, which is usually when the back office starts creaking

targets.title: Founder and CEO
targets.signalPlain: Camber's team page just dropped its old analytics tool and added a data hire, so a switch is underway
